reply_content: Sorry for any confusion with our newest update! You can access your current pack by looking under the "Meditate" tab and browsing through your Recents section. Hope this helps, but please don't hesitate to reach out to our team at help@headspace.com if you have any questions.

content: Too glitchy. Very frustrating 'app offline' error messages that strike at random. Impossible to know if a silence is real or because the track has crashed. Tough to truly relax when you're thinking about whether the app is still running or not.

reply_content: Thank you for your feedback! We're sorry to hear you aren't enjoying the new changes in the app, and will make sure to let our team know. Our goal at Headspace has always been to reach as many people as we can with the tools to help live healthier and happier lives. If you have any suggestions, please send our team an email at help@Headspace.com.

Note: this updated review score is for the app only, not the content. The app continues, even 5 years later, to be underwhelming, confusing, and often buggy. Almost nothing appears to be stored on your device (despite a 300-400 MB download size), meaning every time you load a page in the app, everything is downloaded as if you're browsing a webpage.
